name: 01 Ingest — Discover Projects
description: Discovers earthworks construction projects via region-parametrized serper.dev queries, extracts fields with an OpenAI mini model, and idempotently upserts them into projects as 'new'. Logs each run.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name of one specific construction project, if the text is about a named project. Leave empty for generic articles, directories, vendor pages, or market reports.

attributes.name: project_type
attributes.description: Project type, e.g. datacenter, solar, highway, warehouse

attributes.name: est_earthworks_cu_yd
attributes.description: Estimated earthworks cut/fill volume in cubic yards. Digits only; leave empty if not stated.

attributes.name: site_acres
attributes.description: Site size in acres. Digits only; leave empty if not stated.

attributes.name: timeline_stage
attributes.description: One of: announced, permitting, breaking_ground, under_construction

attributes.name: capex_est
attributes.description: Estimated capital expenditure in USD. Digits only; leave empty if not stated.

options.systemPromptTemplate: You are a precise information extraction algorithm for construction-project data. Extract a field ONLY when it is explicitly stated in the provided text (a web search result: title, snippet, URL). If a value is not clearly present, leave it empty — never infer, guess, or invent company names, locations, or numeric values. If the text is a generic article, directory, market report, vendor page, or is not about one specific named construction project, leave name, owner_company, gc_company and earthworks_sub empty.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO runs (workflow, finished_at, items_out, notes) VALUES ('01_ingest', now(), $1, 'ingest discovery run')
